heading: Designation of officer to sign routine papers
label: 1509 Designation of officer to sign routine papers
text: The Secretary may designate an officer of the Department to sign minor routine official papers and documents during the temporary absence of the Secretary, the Under Secretary, and the Assistant Secretaries of the Department.
notes: CodificationAssistant Secretary changed to Assistant Secretaries by act , which provided for an additional Assistant Secretary.
